ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "scraper_order" TEXT /* Order identifier for the web scraping process */,
  "start_url" TEXT /* URL from which the product was scraped */,
  "item_link" TEXT /* Link to the product item */,
  "item_link_href" TEXT /* Direct URL to the product detail page */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "image_src" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock" TEXT /* Stock availability status */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity associated with the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID of the product */,
  "last_price_update" TEXT /* Last time the price was updated */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last time the stock was updated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the product was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the product information was updated */,
  "is_promoted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently promoted */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, marketer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the products table */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time when the price was recorded */,
  "source_website" TEXT /* Source website where the price was scraped from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_history" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the products table */,
  "stock" TEXT /* Stock availability status at the time of the entry */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the product at the time of the entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock was recorded */,
  "source_website" TEXT /* Source website where the stock was scraped from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the user_roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the user_permissions table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)
